_meta.provenance: Empirically calibrated from 13 real-arm limit points collected via workbench on 2026-05-29. Workspace annulus, z limits, and J1 ranges derived from measured extremes. J2/J3 upper bounds from measured. J2/J3/J4 lower bounds use spec values since not empirically probed. Coupling polygon NOT fitted in v1 — data shows non-linear envelope that calibrate_bounds v1's linear regression can't capture; pending Phase 2b v2.

_provenance.annulus_inner: calibrate_bounds output, 20mm margin from observed min planar radius
_provenance.annulus_outer: calibrate_bounds output, clamped at spec reach 440mm. Real arm reached ρ≈436mm at outer_left45.
_provenance.z_min: observed at floor_0 (J2=82.8, J3=77.3, J4=81.2), bare flange touching tabletop. Future tools: z_min_effective = z_min + tool.z_offset_mm.
_provenance.z_max: observed only — not explicitly probed. Real arm can likely go higher (spec workspace ~280mm above origin).
_provenance.j1_rear_dead_zone: spec value retained. Real arm reached J1=±157~159° in outer_left135/right135 → confirms ~40° rear gap (360° − 2×160° = 40°).

_provenance.J1: both ends intentionally pushed to limit during outer_left135/right135采集
_provenance.J2: upper bound from floor_0 (J2=82.8, pushed to limit). Lower bound: spec value -25° retained (real arm not pushed to J2 lower limit during采集; observed min was -14.7° during coupling test).
_provenance.J3: upper bound from floor_0 (J3=77.3, pushed to limit). Lower bound: spec value -25° retained (real arm not pushed to J3 lower limit).
_provenance.J4: spec range retained — J4 was not exercised during Phase 2b采集 (observed range was a random subset).

_coupling_note.reason: Real arm data shows non-linear coupling envelope that calibrate_bounds v1 (linear regression with J3>50 filter) cannot capture.

observed_data.(J2=+63.9, J3max=35.7): Z_FLOOR_MASQUERADING — limit is table collision, not coupling

_coupling_note.v1_protection_gap: Without coupling polygon, safety only enforces per-axis J3 ≤ 77.3°. Some (J2, J3) combinations will pass safety but alarm at controller (e.g., J2=0, J3=70 — passes per-axis check but real arm alarms because at J2=0 the coupling limit is J3 ≈ 55).
_coupling_note.fallback_behavior: When Phase 5 sends MovL violating real coupling, controller alarms → mid-motion error. Safety layer not catching, but no hardware damage (controller's own safety catches). Plan: Phase 2b v2 upgrade calibrate_bounds + collect more points.
v2_plan: Upgrade calibrate_bounds to handle non-linear / piecewise envelope
Detect z_floor masqueraders (high J2 + low J3 patterns)
Collect 5~8 additional coupling points at mid-z height (avoiding table interference)
Output piecewise linear or polygon constraint set

_future_tool_offset.note: Phase 6 controller will add tool transforms. z_min is currently for bare flange.
